name: Elphabus Thropp
description:
Elphabus Thropp.

Son of Frexspar Thropp, Governor of Munchkinland and his deceased wife Melena Thropp.

Born with a peculiar emerald green skin caused by unknown causes, long hair as black as ravens' wings, piercing brown eyes and a pronounced aquiline nose with a sharp chin.

Even if his only purpose was to safeguard the integrity and independence of his paraplegic younger sister Nessarose, Elphabus quickly realized that like everything else in his life, he would always be an outcast.

Art created by @dogguivi on Tumblr.
creator: RenRoux
